nodes.name: Desert cisticola
nodes.summary: The desert cisticola (Cisticola aridulus) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is present throughout much of sub-Saharan Africa, although relatively absent from central and coastal western areas of the continent. It is an insectivore. It forages primarily in grassy vegetation. References External links Desert cisticola - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
